page_metadata.biotools__summary: A R bioinformatics package for analysis of alternative polyadenylation isoforms. Perform 3'UTR APA, Intronic APA and gene expression analysis using RNA-seq data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A R bioinformatics package for analysis of alternative polyadenylation isoforms. Perform 3'UTR APA, Intronic APA and gene expression analysis using RNA-seq data.
